presets.title: 1. Bold Signal
presets.layout: Colored card on dark gradient. Number top-left, navigation top-right, title bottom-left.

presets.title: 2. Electric Studio
presets.layout: Split panel—white top, blue bottom. Brand marks in corners.

presets.title: 3. Creative Voltage
presets.layout: Split panels—electric blue left, dark right. Script accents.

presets.title: 4. Dark Botanical
presets.layout: Centered content on dark. Abstract soft shapes in corner.

presets.title: 5. Notebook Tabs
presets.layout: Cream paper card on dark background. Colorful tabs on right edge.

presets.title: 6. Pastel Geometry
presets.layout: White card on pastel background. Vertical pills on right edge.

presets.title: 7. Split Pastel
presets.layout: Two-color vertical split (peach left, lavender right).

presets.title: 8. Vintage Editorial
presets.layout: Centered content on cream. Abstract geometric shapes as accent.
